title: AstralSwords Lite
description: AstralSwords adds powerful, lore-inspired swords with unique abilities, each reflecting the strength and spirit of its creator.
body:
![Thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87569c43be78a3f955874145db4f9210bdb31820_0.webp)
### 🌟 **Join Our Discord for Giveaways & Events!** 🎮
Join our **[Discord Server](https://discord.gg/snkKDmc89f)** 🔗 for monthly giveaways & events where you can win coupon codes or plugins like **[AstralSwords Premium](https://builtbybit.com/resources/astral-swords.81777/)** or **[TrimBlades](https://builtbybit.com/resources/trimblades.87033/)**! Plus, grab the official **[Astral Swords Texture Pack](https://discord.gg/snkKDmc89f)** on the **Discord Server** for free! 🎨🚀 --- # ⚔️ **AstralSwords v1.2.16 — Fixes & Improvements** ✨ **v1.2.16** brings bug fixes, GUI improvements, and a cleaner update system — no more auto-downloads, just a friendly reminder when a new version is out! 🔔 ---
## 🎥 Sword Textures Showcase ![Sword Textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fb1d9a87ce574dbc85731d1823a5129f3d342ad.png) Experience the stunning custom textures and visual effects of all 11 legendary weapons in action!
--- ## ⚔️ **The Arsenal** — 11 Legendary Swords Each sword is a masterpiece with unique abilities, custom particles, and devastating power. Activate with **F** or your configured trigger key! ### 🌌 Skyfall Blade — *The Meteor* Launch yourself skyward, then crash down with explosive force. The higher you fall, the more devastating the impact — up to **3x damage multiplier**. Creates real explosions that destroy terrain. ### 🐲 Dragon's Wrath — *The Inferno* Summon a **lingering dragon breath cloud** at your target location. Enemies caught inside take continuous damage and wither effects for 10 seconds. Channel the power of the Ender Dragon itself. ### 👤 Shadowbane — *The Debilitator* Unleash a wave of darkness in a 5-block radius. All nearby enemies are afflicted with **Weakness** and **Blindness** — perfect for turning the tide in group fights. ### ⚡ Thunderstrike — *The Storm Caller* Toggle lightning mode on your attacks. Each hit has a **45% chance** to call down real lightning on your target. Deals bonus damage during rain. You're immune to your own lightning. ### ☠️ Venom Edge — *The Plague* Release a toxic cloud that poisons all enemies within 5 blocks. Applies **Poison II** for 10 seconds and **Slowness** — watch them wither away. ### 🌘 Eclipse Blade — *The Phantom* Blind nearby enemies and become **invisible for 90 seconds**. Your invisibility persists even when switching items — true stealth until the timer ends. ### ❤️ Soul Reaver — *The Lifesteal* A passive ability that heals you with every hit. Normal attacks restore **0.5 hearts**, critical hits restore **1.5 hearts**. The more you fight, the longer you survive. ### 🐦‍🔥 Phoenix Talon — *The Firestorm* Launch an explosive fireball that detonates on impact, setting the area ablaze. Deals **4 hearts of fire damage** and ignites enemies. You're immune to explosion damage while holding it. > **Passive:** Grants permanent **Fire Resistance** while held. ### 👹 Warden's Oath — *The Devastator* Unleash a **sonic boom cone** that deals up to **15 hearts of damage** — matching the Warden mob itself. Damage scales with distance, knockback included. ### 🌪️ Windblade — *The Swift* Dash forward instantly with a 5-second cooldown. Perfect for chasing, escaping, or repositioning mid-combat. > **Passive:** Grants permanent **Speed II** while held. ### 💪 Power House — *The Earthquake* Slam the ground to create a **15-block shockwave**. All enemies are launched into the air and take 3 hearts of damage. The expanding particle effect is pure spectacle. --- ## ✨ **Features** ### ⚙️ Customization - **Custom Trigger System** – Bind abilities to any key (F, Q, or any MC keybind) - **Configurable Enchantments** – Adjust enchantment levels for each sword in config - **Configurable Recipes** – Modify crafting recipes or disable specific swords - **Per-Sword Crafting Toggle** – Enable/disable crafting for individual swords ### 🔒 Protection System - **Container Protection** – Swords can't be stored in chests, barrels, shulkers, etc. - **Hopper Protection** – Hoppers can't pick up astral swords - **Item Frame Protection** – Prevent swords from being placed in item frames - **Anvil Restrictions** – Block renaming and enchanting via anvils (configurable) ### 🎮 Gameplay - **Sword Tracking** – Each sword is unique, no duplicates allowed - **Trust System** – `/trust` players to prevent friendly fire from abilities - **Playstyle Types** – Each sword has a role: Duelist, Initiator, Controller, or Sentinel - **Passive Effects** – Some swords grant buffs just by holding them ### 📢 Server Features - **Global Crafting Announcements** – Broadcast when a legendary sword is forged - **Anonymous Mode** – Option to hide crafter names in announcements - **In-Game Recipe GUI** – View all recipes with `/aswords recipes` - **Craftable Tracker** – Use `/aswords craftable` to see which swords are still unclaimed and available to forge ### 🛠️ Admin Tools - **Permission System** – Granular permissions for all admin commands - **Crafting Control** – Toggle crafting on/off per sword with `/aswords craft on|off` — perfect for events or limiting rare swords - **Version Reminders** – Notified on startup if a new version is available, with a clickable Modrinth link - **Hot Reload** – Reload config without restarting the server - **Give Commands** – Spawn swords or crafting materials for players --- --- ## 🖥️ Need a Server? 👀 Looking for reliable Minecraft hosting? Check out **[Atlass Hosting](https://client.atlass.host?ref=ciscocodes)** — affordable, fast, and perfect for running AstralSwords! ⚡ ---
💬 **Got suggestions or found a bug?** Jump into **[Discord](https://discord.gg/snkKDmc89f)** and let me know! ## ☕ Support Me on Ko-fi If you like my work, consider buying me a coffee: [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/ciscocodes)
